steps.title: Confirm scene safety
steps.description: Confirm scene is safe before approaching. Note any hazards (traffic, fire, violence) in the field log.

steps.title: Confirm cardiac arrest
steps.description: Confirm unresponsive, not breathing normally (or only agonal gasps), no pulse on a 10-second check.

steps.title: Start high-quality CPR
steps.description: Begin chest compressions at 100-120/min, depth 5-6cm, full recoil, minimal interruption. Attach defibrillator/monitor as soon as available.
steps.guideline_ref: Kenya BLS/ACLS Field Protocol â€” Cardiac Arrest, Section 2

steps.title: Analyse rhythm / defibrillate if indicated
steps.description: Pause compressions briefly for rhythm analysis. Defibrillate if shockable rhythm (VF/pulseless VT) per device prompts, then resume CPR immediately.
steps.guideline_ref: Kenya BLS/ACLS Field Protocol â€” Cardiac Arrest, Section 3

steps.title: Manage airway
steps.description: Establish airway per local scope of practice (OPA/supraglottic/ETT) without significantly interrupting compressions.
steps.guideline_ref: Kenya BLS/ACLS Field Protocol â€” Airway Management

steps.title: Establish IV/IO access
steps.description: Establish vascular access for medication administration per local scope of practice and formulary (see Phase 0.5 â€” open decision on prehospital drug list).

steps.title: Document vitals / rhythm checks
steps.description: Log each rhythm check, shock delivered, and any return-of-spontaneous-circulation (ROSC) signs as they occur.

steps.title: Determine disposition
steps.description: Record outcome: ROSC achieved and transporting, continued resuscitation in transport, or resuscitation terminated per local termination-of-resuscitation criteria and medical control contact.
